watchers.name: cli-commands
watchers.detect: New or renamed command names from `program.command()` / Commander definitions. New or removed flags from `.option()`. Argument signature changes. Help-text changes.

watchers.name: env-vars
watchers.detect: Lines matching `^[A-Z_][A-Z0-9_]*=` in .env.example; `process.env.X` reads; zod env schema fields. Append-only edits are auto-merge; renames/removals escalate to PR tier.

watchers.name: rest-routes
watchers.detect: Route registrations (`app.get/post/put/delete`, fastify `route({...})`). New route file = new doc page; signature/payload changes = update existing page.

watchers.name: adapters
watchers.detect: New top-level directory under either path = new adapter; create a new doc page mirroring the neighbour pattern. Manifest (`package.json`, `adapter.json`) changes = update existing page.

watchers.name: plugin-sdk
watchers.detect: Changes to exported types/functions from `src/index.ts` (public API surface). Internal-only changes ignored.

watchers.name: schemas
watchers.detect: Zod / drizzle schema field additions, removals, or type changes on entities surfaced in docs (companies, agents, issues, routines, approvals, secrets).

watchers.name: release-notes
watchers.detect: Fetched via `gh release view <tag>` to give other watchers framing/intent. Never produces edits directly — release notes are reference data, not source.
